title: Small Items Mod
description: Change the size of items and your hand (Small hand mod)
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adb2cb73aa9cabe2948d41a3db32ad2376c39c2c.png)


<center>

# Small Items (MOD)

Small Items mod lets you change how big or small your held item looks in **first person**.

Make your item smaller for PvP, move it up or down, or scale it however you like - all in-game, no resource pack needed.

</center>

---

## Features

- Change **item size** in first person
- Adjust **height & depth**
- **Live preview** while editing
- Optional **Mod Menu** config screen
- Client-side only, safe for multiplayer
- Works with any texture pack or shader

---

## Configuration

If you have **Mod Menu** installed, Smallhands adds a settings button where you can tweak everything with sliders.

No Mod Menu? The mod still works with default values.

---
